localizations.title: The Temple of RA
localizations.code_1247: You press the 4 hieroglyphs and the wall pivots. It is dark but still you can see a hidden room.
localizations.code_4233: The sarcophagus opens…. It is empty. At the bottom, you see a message.
localizations.code_6815: The false bottom opens! You find a strange papyrus. You’ll be able to prove how right you were to everyone. Hooray!
localizations.hint_6: You must spend time to understand.
localizations.hint_8_first: You must spell the name of RA.
localizations.hint_8: You already have the R, so you still need to find the second half.
localizations.hint_9: It is not a number or a letter, it is a hieroglyph.
localizations.hint_15: These engravings are not trivial. But it has no usefulness whatsoever in the anteroom.
localizations.hint_20: It is a hieroglyph. It must have something to do with the wall.
localizations.hint_22: You must take a good look at these hieroglyphs.
localizations.hint_23: This pattern looks like the tiling's pattern.
localizations.hint_24: On the god's headdress, it is not the infinity.
localizations.hint_55: There are 9 lines. You must press the 4 hieroglyphs in a specific color sequence. You must find them in the room.
localizations.hint_60_first: You must shift these groups of 9 letters. The diagram of the shift is engraved somewhere on the wall.
localizations.hint_60: Once you'll have these three words, you'll find what you are looking for in the discard pile.
localizations.hint_85: Three of these hieroglyphs are on the ankh, which perfectly slides in the gaps.
localizations.hint_111_first: This pyramid has 26 steps... and several colored blocks.
localizations.hint_111: 26, as the alphabet, starting at the top. The blocks form a six-letter word.
localizations.hint_222: It is a hieroglyph. It must have something to do with the wall.
